channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe licenses second gold refinery to handle rising output
item.description: via Mining.com #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Mining.com

item.title: Galileo to sell Botswana copper licences, shifts focus to Zambia, Zimbabwe projects
item.description: via Mining Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Mining Weekly

item.title: Zimbabwe licenses second gold refinery in Bulawayo
item.description: via Miningmx #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Miningmx

item.title: AFRICA/ZIMBABWE - Diamonds and poverty: production increases in Chiadzwa, but local communities remain marginalized
item.description: via Agenzia Fides #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Agenzia Fides

item.title: Major financial boost for ZIFA as FIFA approves big money funding
item.description: Zimbabwe football receives a major financial boost after FIFA approves significant funding for ZIFA, raising hopes for game-changing reforms. The post Major financial boost for ZIFA as FIFA approves big money funding appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Dyson pursues Belgian route for Zim talent
item.description: Cloud FusireSenior Sports Writer FOOTBALL scout and player developer, Jomo Dyson has embarked on an ambitious programme aimed at creating opportunities for... via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Legal Discussions with Vengai Madzima: Investing in Business and Knowledge Process Outsourcing
item.description: NewZimbabwe.com has invited Mr. Vengai Madzima, the Senior Partner at Madzima Chidyausiku Museta Legal Practitioners (MCM Legal), to discuss with us legal issues that affect Zimbabweans. The discussions are of a general nature and those seeking specific legal advice should contac via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe repatriates 660 from South Africa as xenophobia tensions escalate
item.description: ZIMBABWE has begun repatriating its nationals from South Africa amid growing fears of possible xenophobic attacks ahead of a June 30 deadline set by an anti-immigration pressure group, with 660 citizens having returned home so far. The development comes as tensions rise across So via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Open doors for advertisers, sponsors and partners across the Zim diaspora corridor. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
